title: Flaky Citrusy French Puff Pastry Mille-Feuille
description: A show-off French dessert featuring citrusy, caraway seed-infused puff pastry layers, perfect for special occasions.
instructions: Roll out the puff pastry to a thickness of about 1/8 inch.
Brush the pastry with the softened butter, making sure to leave a 1-inch border around the edges.
Sprinkle the granulated sugar and caraway seeds evenly over the pastry.
Mix the orange juice and zest, then brush the mixture over the pastry, leaving the border untouched.
Dust the pastry with powdered sugar.
Place the pastry in a 9x13-inch baking dish and bake for 15 minutes.
Roll out the remaining puff pastry to a thickness of about 1/8 inch.
Repeat the process with the second pastry sheet, creating the second layer of the mille-feuille.
Assemble the mille-feuille by placing the two pastry sheets together, with the second layer on top.
Dust the top of the mille-feuille with powdered sugar and serve immediately.
